message.content:
[
  {
    "platform": "Opal (Google AI)",
    "key_concepts": "How to sign up for Opal, How to access the platform dashboard",
    "faq_question": "How do I get started with Google's Opal AI platform?",
    "faq_answer": "To get started, navigate to opal.google.com, sign in with your Google account, and grant the necessary permissions to access the main dashboard.",
    "difficulty_level": "beginner",
    "prerequisites": "A Google account"
  },
  {
    "platform": "Opal (Google AI)",
    "key_concepts": "How to create an AI app with a prompt, How to generate a workflow from a description",
    "faq_question": "How do I create a new AI mini-app in Opal?",
    "faq_answer": "Create a new app by clicking 'Create New' on the dashboard, then describe the app's functionality (e.g., 'a blog post generator') in the prompt box and submit it to generate the workflow.",
    "difficulty_level": "beginner",
    "prerequisites": "Access to the Opal dashboard, An idea for an app to describe"
  },
  {
    "platform": "Opal (Google AI)",
    "key_concepts": "How to edit workflow nodes, How to select AI models, How to set output formats, How to customize app themes",
    "faq_question": "How do I customize and configure my Opal app after creating it?",
    "faq_answer": "You can customize your app by editing individual nodes to change their function or rename them, selecting specific AI models for different steps, and configuring the output format (e.g., a web page). You can also generate or upload custom themes.",
    "difficulty_level": "intermediate",
    "prerequisites": "A created Opal app workflow"
  },
  {
    "platform": "Opal (Google AI)",
    "key_concepts": "How to run an Opal app, How to share an app publicly, How to monitor workflow execution",
    "faq_question": "How do I run and share an AI app I built in Opal?",
    "faq_answer": "Click 'Start' to run your app and provide any required input. You can monitor the execution progress in the workflow view. To share, click 'Share App', set permissions to 'Public' or 'Anyone with the link', and then copy the generated link.",
    "difficulty_level": "beginner",
    "prerequisites": "A configured Opal app"
  }
]
